with Venus, in the eyes; with Saturn, Rahu or Ketu, in the
armpits. Lords of the 6th and 8th occupying the 7th and the
8th respectively will cause piles. The Sun, the Moon, Mars,
Mercury, Jupiter, Venus or Saturn joining the lord of the
6th in the ascendant indicate respectively danger from high
fevers, watery diseases or grandular swellings or ulcer,
bilious complaints, consumption, sexual troubles, nervous
diseases, carbuncle or spleen trouble. Evil planets in the 6th
or lord of the 6th with Saturn or Rahu will cause the native
to suffer always. One suffers greatly from fever in his 6th
and 12th years if Mars is in the 6th and the lord of the 6th is
in the 8th. He will contact leprosy in his 20th year if the
Moon and Jupiter are in the 6th; watery diseases in 26th
year if Rahu is in the 6th, and lord of Lagna is in the 8th;
colic in the 30th year if there is Parivarthana (mutual
exchange

Concerning the Sixth House 249
